prompt:
Subject: Spring portrait enveloped in cherry blossoms and sea breeze

Person/Expression: Japanese woman in her early 20s, long black hair with thin bangs, translucent skin, natural Japanese-style makeup, soft and elegant atmosphere, calm and slightly fleeting expression, natural eye contact with the camera.

Clothing/Pose: White short-sleeved shirt, pale pink knit vest, large light blue ribbon, pastel blue checked pleated skirt, short black socks, black loafers, black shoulder bag, standing with both hands on the railing behind her and legs lightly crossed.

Background/Light: Japanese seaside park overlooking the sea, blooming cherry blossom branches, promenade, bench, streetlight, low bushes, a few distant silhouettes, sunny spring sunlight, soft natural light, clear atmosphere.

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, full-body portrait, center placement, person sharply in focus, background naturally and softly blurred, 85mm portrait lens, around f2.0, shallow depth of field, deep photographic expression, background figures kept subtle.

Texture/Style: High-definition, realistic AI photography, natural skin texture, delicate hair details, spring-like pale pastel colors, Japanese youth portrait style, translucent and gentle tones, elegant and clean photographic expression.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, body distortion, excessive skin beautification, overexposure, text, logo, watermark, overcrowded background, messy clothing, unnatural props.
